name: devtools-tracing
description: Utilities for working with trace files

scripts.build: tsc --emitDeclarationOnly || true; esbuild index.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/index.js --format=cjs && esbuild cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/cli.js --format=cjs --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' --external:../
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run generate && npm run build

author: Samuel Maddock <sam@samuelmaddock.com>
